summary.lv: Grafton Latvia klienta — strauji augoša starptautiska fintech SaaS uzņēmuma — vārdā meklē Financial Systems Support speciālistu, kas būs pirmā kontaktpersona finanšu sistēmu lietotājiem, atbalstīs finanšu procesus un risinās pieteikumus, izmantojot ITSM rīkus (galvenokārt Jira) un ITIL pieeju.
summary.en: On behalf of a fast-growing international fintech SaaS client, Grafton Latvia is recruiting a Financial Systems Support Specialist to be the first point of contact for finance-system users, support finance processes and resolve tickets using ITSM tools (mainly Jira) and ITIL-aligned processes.
